sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84211" key="poqhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποθ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n84211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disposed to long for,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ὀρεκτικὸν καὶ π. τινός</foreign> Metop. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.115</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
